title: Cobblemon: Dimensions
description: This is a modpack that includes many mods about dimensions and quality of life functions, but you can't forget Cobblemon.
body:
Something weird is happening in Cobblemon.
It seems that other dimensions are spreading into yours.
With this new opportunity, why not adventure through them.
You can do with them as you wish, but remember that the most beatiful of things are also usually the most dangerous.





This is a modpack that includes over 400 mods that range from quality of life to mods that make you scared for your life.
Do you want Cobblemon with a bit more variety to adventure, then this is for you.
You can experience Cobblemon like never before with mod like many texture packs, datapaks, shader packs, QoL Mods, and of course various Create mods.
The terrain is also very different with over 100 new biomes, over 50 new mobs (excluding the Cobblemon mod), over 10 new bosses, and over 5 new dimension to explore.
If your a player who wants an easy and simple adventure, then survive with the ease of the Create mod and the mobility and combat of cobblemon without many worries.
To those of you that want to spice up your adventure, explore the many new dimension and find what there is to explore.
Not just that, cobblemon are nice and all for fighting, but in certain situations your cobblemon won't cut it, so train yourself with various forms of magic and some unusual familiars like croissant dragons, anteaters, and many more.
Not to mention the armor and weapons you could earn by defeating bosses and various enemies could aid you well on your adventures too.
So set of on your adventure and don't let the confines of whats "normal" to hold you back.




Suggestions: This runs best when the memory that is allocated for this modpack is set to between 10,000MB and 15,000MB.
